archetype: Organic & Earthy / Old Money Tech Fusion

design_philosophy.core_concept: The aesthetic is designed for an RBI audit-ready NBFC in India. It must convey high-end institutional trust, stability, and approachability without relying on the generic blue-and-white 'fintech' tropes. We are using an editorial 'Old Money Tech' approach for policy pages (heavy serif typography, structured margins) combined with 'Organic & Earthy' modern minimalism for marketing pages.
design_philosophy.placeholders: All placeholders MUST be explicitly 'xxxxxxxx'. Do not use realistic placeholder text like 'John Doe'. The design treats these gracefully: wrap 'xxxxxxxx' in a subtle inline style (e.g., `font-mono text-muted-foreground bg-muted/50 px-1 rounded-sm`) so they read as intentional variables awaiting user input.

background.description: Bone White / Warm Sand. Never use pure white (#FFFFFF) for the main app background to prevent eye strain on long reading pages.

surface.description: Crisp white for cards and policy text containers to create contrast with the background.

primary.description: Deep Forest / Charcoal Green. Used for text, major headings, and primary buttons. Conveys stability, wealth, and authority.

accent.description: Warm Terracotta / Clay. Used sparingly for hover states, key trust indicators (like RBI badges), and active navigation links.

text.description: Primary text uses the Deep Forest hue. Muted text uses a lighter sage-grey to maintain the earthy aesthetic.

rules.headings: Headings MUST use Cormorant Garamond. Use font-light or font-medium to let the serif character shine. DO NOT default to bold.
rules.body: Body text MUST use Manrope for maximum legibility, especially on data-heavy loan tables and policy pages.
rules.placeholders: Any 'xxxxxxxx' placeholder must use JetBrains Mono or Tailwind's default mono to distinctly highlight it as a variable.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing. Use p-8, p-12, p-24 for section paddings.

grid_patterns.marketing: Use asymmetrical bento layouts for 'Loan Products' and 'About' sections.
grid_patterns.editorial_policy: For regulatory pages (Fair Practices, KYC, Privacy, etc.), use a 2-column layout: a sticky sidebar (w-64) for the Table of Contents, and a wide, left-aligned content area (max-w-3xl) for the text. Use `prose prose-lg prose-headings:font-serif prose-stone` to format the long-form text beautifully.

spacing_and_layout.borders: Expose the grid. Use 1px subtle borders (`border-[#E5E3DB]`) to separate sections and cards instead of shadows.

buttons.primary: Solid background (`bg-[#1A2421]`), crisp white text, sharp corners (`rounded-none` or max `rounded-sm`).
buttons.secondary: Outline button with 1px border of primary color, text in primary color.

cards.style: Flat, 1px border (`border-[#E5E3DB]`), sharp or max 4px radius (`rounded-sm`). No heavy shadows. On hover, apply a subtle `-translate-y-1` and `shadow-sm`.

badges.style: Used for 'RBI Registered', 'CIN: xxxxxxxx'. Light terracotta background (`bg-[#B85C38]/10`), terracotta text (`text-[#B85C38]`), small uppercase font.

how_it_works_steps.style: Use 'The Tracing Beam' or 'Grid Borders' concept. A vertical timeline with a 1px solid line connecting nodes, styled minimally.

navigation.style: Solid background (`bg-[#F9F8F6]`), sticky top. Sub-menus (if any) should be flat, border-lined dropdowns.

motion.philosophy: Subtle and sophisticated. Avoid bouncy animations.
rules: Hover states must instantly change colors but smoothly transition transforms (0.2s ease).
Use staggered fade-ins for the 7-step 'How It Works' list.
Use `react-fast-marquee` for a slow, elegant 'Editorial Ribbon' of trust signals or partners if needed.

media.rules: All placeholders are 'xxxxxxxx'. Never use generic stock icons if you can use minimal typography or abstract imagery. Only use the media URLs provided below.

image_urls.description: Wide-angle modern glass office building interior, minimal, premium corporate finance feel.
Macro photography of stacked smooth river stones in perfect balance, earthy tones.
Abstract architectural visualization of interlocking arches, elegant and modern.
Minimalist portrait of an Indian business owner.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the website as a static marketing/corporate site.
Install and configure fonts: Cormorant Garamond (Heading), Manrope (Body).
Install and configure Lucide React for icons.
For the 'How It Works' 7-step process, build a clear vertical connected-node layout.
For the 10 policy/regulatory pages, create a shared Editorial Layout Component that takes a `title` and `children`, featuring a sticky Table of Contents sidebar.
For every piece of text marked as 'xxxxxxxx' in the brief, wrap it in `xxxxxxxx`.
For tables (Rates, Fees & Charges), use Shadcn Table components styled without rounded corners to fit the sharp aesthetic.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes.
Prioritize HTML semantics and accessibility (WCAG AA).
DO NOT use generic blue colors. Stick strictly to the Bone/Forest/Terracotta palette provided.
